g.title: action.circulation:parent_circ->action.circulation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (parent_circ) REFERENCES action.circulation(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.circulation:usr->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (usr) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.circulation:circ_lib->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (circ_lib) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.circulation:workstation->actor.workstation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (workstation) REFERENCES actor.workstation(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.circulation:checkin_workstation->actor.workstation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (checkin_workstation) REFERENCES actor.workstation(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.circulation:copy_location->asset.copy_location:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (copy_location) REFERENCES asset.copy_location(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.circulation_limit_group_map:circ->action.circulation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (circ) REFERENCES action.circulation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.emergency_closing_circulation:circulation->action.circulation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (circulation) REFERENCES action.circulation(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: action.usr_circ_history:source_circ->action.circulation:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (source_circ) REFERENCES action.circulation(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
